overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Batman: Arkham Knight showing the character walking across a rain-soaked gothic rooftop at night. The scene features detailed neo-gothic architecture with illuminated windows and neon signs against a dark stormy sky, with the camera following Batman as he navigates the elevated terrace.

agents.ego_description: Batman walks steadily across the rain-slicked rooftop terrace toward the illuminated cathedral tower, cape flowing behind him

entered.detail: Massive gothic structure with illuminated windows and red neon signage at the top
Ornate stone balustrade lining the edge of the rooftop
Victorian-style lamp post emitting greenish light
Wet stone pavement reflecting the ambient light

segments.scene_description: Batman stands on an open gothic rooftop terrace in the rain, facing a massive illuminated cathedral tower in the distance. The camera follows from behind as he walks forward across the wet stone surface, with ornate railings and vintage street lamps visible along the path.

events.description: Batman begins turning right to follow the rooftop path, changing direction from facing the cathedral to walking alongside it

agents.ego_description: Batman turns right and continues walking along the rooftop path, passing by large stone columns and architectural details

entered.detail: Raised circular stone platform with decorative railing surrounding a central feature
Massive cylindrical stone pillar supporting the rooftop architecture

segments.scene_description: As Batman turns right, the cathedral tower shifts to the left side of the frame while he walks along a narrower path lined with massive stone columns. He passes a raised stone platform structure and continues along the rain-soaked walkway, with the camera smoothly following his movement.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated rooftop promenade with city view

events.description: View opens up beyond the railing to reveal the distant city skyline with scattered lights

agents.ego_description: Batman continues walking toward the edge of the rooftop, passing between large stone columns as the city view opens up ahead

entered.detail: Scattered lights from buildings in the distant cityscape visible beyond the rooftop edge

segments.scene_description: Batman walks along the final stretch of the rooftop promenade, passing closely by large stone columns as the stone railing approaches on the right. The view opens up to reveal the distant city skyline beyond the edge, with rain continuing to fall as he reaches the overlook point.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a rain-soaked gothic rooftop that transitions from a wide terrace toward a narrow overlook of the city skyline. It begins with Batman walking across a wet stone surface toward a massive illuminated cathedral tower, passing ornate railings and vintage street lamps. As he turns right, the cathedral shifts to the side of the frame and the path narrows, leading him past massive stone columns and a raised platform. The scene then follows him along the final stretch of the promenade, gliding closely by the remaining columns before the stone railing on the right gives way to an open view. Finally, the perspective expands to reveal the distant city skyline as he reaches the edge of the rooftop under the falling rain.
